title: Run for Your Wife
writer: Rodolfo Sonego, Rafael Azcona, Ennio Flaiano
actors: Ugo Tognazzi, Rhonda Fleming, Graziella Granata
plot: Riccardo, an unhappily married middle aged Italian working for a shoe factory, goes to America on a four day business trip. In New York City he meets his old friend Carlo. Carlo has a big American car and house. "How can you affor...
